summary: Excellent presence and clarity in the recording paired with a fun, well‑received performance.
review: All three reviewers praised this April 29 1980 show for its strong musical vibe and superior sound quality. The presence captured by Walker and Miller’s work is repeatedly highlighted, though no specific songs or band‑member moments are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer stars (5, 5, 4) and unanimous praise for both the performance and the recording indicate a very good show with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note strong presence, clarity and overall superb capture; they specifically commend Ms. Walker and Mr. Miller for the recording work.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
